transcription.text: This might be the best $29 I've spent in New York City. This is known as the Beast and it's a super fast speedboat that rockets you through the Hudson River at 45 miles per hour all the way out to the Statue of Liberty. Along the way they do rips and turns in the water which create massive waves that blast you in the face. And if the wave misses you, fear not because the staff is strapped with super soakers taking no prisoners. And of course all along the way you get to enjoy breathtaking views of the city. Follow for more New York City tours.
